name: Impact Reef
summary: Qualitative public-good impact capture and evaluation tooling.
description: Impact Reef is described in public Dev Guild project context as a tool for capturing qualitative data for public-good projects, backed by community endorsements and designed to help surface value to funders.

seo.title: Impact Reef · Greenpill Network
seo.description: Impact Reef is an experimental Greenpill Dev Guild project for qualitative public-good impact capture.
